text.title: Outcome Based Roadmaps Advanced Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Outcome Based Roadmaps Advanced.

example.scenario: Board goal 'increase ARR 20% by EOY26'. Outcome 'reduce 30-day churn from 8% to 5%'; leading indicator 'week-2 retention'; experiment 'wedge onboarding rewrite, success = +5pp wk-2 retention in cohort N≥200'; confidence Medium → High after wk-4 data.
